---
title : "The Influence of Attribution Patterns on Political Participation in Comparative Perspective"
date : "2009-01-01"
author : "Schneider, S. & Castillo, J."
categories : ["Report"]
publication : " . Dublin Trinity College"
publication_short : " . Dublin Trinity College"
abstract : "(Abstract not available)"
abstract_short : ""
about:
  template: marquee
---
---


::: {.callout-note title="How to cite this work"}

Schneider, S. & Castillo, J. (2009). *The Influence of Attribution Patterns on Political Participation in Comparative Perspective*.  . Dublin Trinity College

:::
